jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: targeted storage route and neighboring storage tests 26/26 passed
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next, vcontrolhub-ssh-ws active after restart; /api/status ready; storage route probes returned 401/307 without 500; no recent warning/error logs

lastRun.summary: Added hard inline-read and upload memory guards: SFTP read now rejects files over 1 MB via indexed size before remote download and via post-read fallback; LOCAL/SFTP upload endpoint rejects declared files over 100 MB before arrayBuffer, storage lookup, grants, or backing writes.
validation: storage route probes and recent service log check
lastRun.deployment: production services restarted and smoke 19/19 passed
lastRun.nextTarget: Continue remaining P2 access-control fallback hardening, then rotate to P3 Quick Services permissions/task robustness

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
